Furnishing NPWT using a disposable device is included in consolidated 
billing under the home health benefit. However, payment for the device is 
not bundled into the HH PPS payment rates. HHAs must bill for NPWT 
using a disposable device in accordance with billing instructions. Payment 
is in addition to the HH PPS
